---
title: "STA-209 - Applied Statistics (Spring 2026)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: false
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
---

$~$

Last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%a %b %e %Y, %H:%M")`

<hr style="border: none; border-top: 5px solid black;">

# Syllabus

Welcome to the course website for STAT 209, Introduction to Applied Statistics. To begin, you can find the course syllabus linked below:

- [Click here](syllabus209s26.html) to view the course syllabus

You can locate course content by scrolling, or by using the navigation bar in the upper left.  

Please note: material will not be posted until we've reached that point in the course.

<hr style="border: none; border-top: 5px solid black;">

## Exam \#1 Content

| Date | Lecture | Lab | Reading |
|:-----|:-------|:-----|:-----|
| Wed 1/21 | [Syllabus](syllabus209s26.html) and [Introduction](Lectures/01_Introduction.pdf) | [Lab](Labs/R_packages.html) | IMS Sections 1.2.1-1.2.3 before Monday |
| Fri 1/23 | [Intro to R](Lectures/R_Introduction.pdf) | [Intro R Lab](Labs/R_Introduction.html) | - |

**Assignments and Deadlines**

1) Install R (https://cran.r-project.org/) before Friday.
2) Install RStudio (https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/) before Friday.

---

## Week 2 (Quantiative Variables)

| Date | Lecture | Lab | Reading |
|:-----|:-------|:-----|:-----|
| Mon 1/26 | - | [Intro R Lab](Labs/R_Introduction.html) cont'd | - |
| Wed 1/28 | [Quantitative Variables -- Part 1](Lectures/QuantVar1.pdf) | [Quant Var Lab](Labs/QuantVarLab.html) | IMS Chapters 5.2-5.5 (pg. 74-82) |
| Fri 1/30 | [Quantitative Variables -- Part 2](Lectures/QuantVar2.pdf) | [Quant Var Lab](Labs/QuantVarLab.html) | - |

---

## Week 3 (Categorical Variables)

| Date | Lecture | Lab | Reading |
|:-----|:-------|:-----|:-----|
| Mon 2/02 | [Categorical Variables](Lectures/CategoricalVariables.pdf) | [Cat Var Lab](Labs/CatVarLab.html) [[Template]](Labs/CatVarLab.Rmd) | - |
| Wed 2/04 | [Tables (for Categorical Information)](Lectures/Tables.pdf) | [Tables Lab](Labs/TablesLab.html) | - |
| Fri 2/05 | [GGplot2] | [ggplot2 Lab](Labs/ggplot2_lab.html) | - |

---

## Week 4

| Date | Lecture | Lab | Reading |
|:-----|:-------|:-----|:-----|
| Mon 2/09 | - | [ggplot2 Lab](Labs/ggplot2_lab.html) cont'd | - |
| Wed 2/11 | - | - | - |
| Fri 2/15 | - | - | - |

---

### Reading Assignments

* IMS Sections 1.2.1-1.2.3 before Monday 1/26.
* IMS Chapters 5.2-5.5 (pg. 74-82) before Monday 2/02

### Lab Assignments

[Intro R Lab](Labs/R_Introduction.html) due on Gradescope Wednesday 1/28 at 10pm. Gradescope info will be given in Class on Monday.

[Quant Var Lab](Labs/QuantVarLab.html) due Wednesday 2/04 at 10pm.

[Cat Var Lab](Labs/CatVarLab.html) due Friday 2/06 at 10pm.

[Tables Lab](Labs/TablesLab.html) due Sunday 2/08 at 10pm.

### Homework Assignments

Will be posted here.



---

<!-- | Date | Lecture | Lab | Reading | -->
<!-- |:-----|:-------|:-----|:-----| -->
<!-- | Mon 2/02 | - | - | - | -->
<!-- | Wed 2/04 | - | - | - | -->
<!-- | Fri 2/05 | - | - | - | -->
